tools.name: get_birth_chart
tools.description: Generate a Vedic birth chart (planets, houses, nakshatras, ascendant, yogas, dashas) for one person.

date.description: Date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format

time.description: Time of birth in HH:MM format (24h, defaults to 12:00)

tools.name: calculate_compatibility
tools.description: Calculate Ashtakoot Milan 36-point compatibility score between two people, including all 8 parameters (Varna, Vashya, Tara, Yoni, Graha Maitri, Gana, Bhakoot, Nadi) and dosha flags.

person_a_date.description: Person A date of birth YYYY-MM-DD

person_b_date.description: Person B date of birth YYYY-MM-DD (omit for single-person analysis)

tools.name: analyze_dosha
tools.description: Check Mangal dosha, Nadi dosha, Kaal Sarpa, and other yoga/dosha patterns for one or two people.

person_a_date.description: Person A date of birth YYYY-MM-DD

person_b_date.description: Person B date of birth YYYY-MM-DD (omit for single-person analysis)

tools.name: get_full_compatibility_report
